title: Warium X Clockwork: The Creations
description: A modpack for warium that adds lots of mods to have fun with, this makes the game more fun and have more experiences.
body:
This modpack has mods to enhance minecraft gameplay with warium, clockwork, VS2, Eureka and Create mod! with this modpack will boost your FPS will be fine if you have a good PC because there are FPS boosting mods so it is recommended for a good computer, but there are lots of mods so low-end PCs might be laggy.

Aiming to add the best create and warium mod experience! It is lots of fun! you can make tanks and cars using the create mod! the limits are ENDLESS!!!

                                              FEATURES OF THIS MODPACK

adds:

🔫Guns- simpler guns than TaCZ.

🧰🧑‍🔧Mechanical stuff and creations- ENDLESS CREATIONS!!!

🌠Physics- VS2 and Create: Propulsion physics.

⚫Cannons- CBC, CBC:MW and CBC:AT (CBC:WP for warium if wanted)

⚔️Tank Armor Blocks- Use these blocks for a better look of your tanks!

☢️Nukes- Warium offers 2 nukes Fission(Nuclear) and Fusion(Thermonuclear).

🌏🗺️Mini Map- Journey Map adds a minimap to help you see further and know your deathpoint!

🤖Robot Invasions- Use the impending doom effect to have a small invasion of robots to attack you!(Only Accessable Via Commands. to give without the commands, the criteria is if you destroy a structure and kill all the robots in it from the mod then you will get the impending doom effect)

🤺Warfare Items(Modern Warfare)- Grenades, Bombs, Missles (there could be torpedoes) etc!

                                              WHY THE USERS WANTS TO DOWNLOAD IT

The good stuff, fun of creations, no limits to make things, journey maps, planes, jets, helicopters, cars, tanks, robot invasions etc!
